aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Focused aggression

💼 Career: Tum ek kaam pe lock-in karoge aur result dikhega

❤️ Love: Direct baat clarity laayegi

💰 Money: Bold step beneficial ho sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Channel your energy wisely

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jab distract nahi hote, tab unbeatable ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Comfort seeking

💼 Career: Extra effort se bachoge toh progress slow hogi

❤️ Love: Routine repetitive lag sakta hai

💰 Money: Stable but no major growth

🧘 Advice: Push beyond comfort

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum growth ke liye risk lene se darte ho

♊ Gemini

💰 Money: Smart choice gain de sakta hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jab clear bolte ho, sab easy ho jata hai
